heading: Statistical reporting of costs and revenues for transporting checks between reserve banks
label: 5016 Statistical reporting of costs and revenues for transporting checks between reserve banks
text: In the annual report prepared by the Board for the first full calendar year after , and in each of the 9 subsequent annual reports by the Board, the Board shall include the amount of operating costs attributable to, and an estimate of the Federal Reserve banks’ imputed revenues derived from, the transportation of commercial checks between Federal Reserve bank check processing centers.October 28, 2003
notes: Effective DateSection effective at the end of the 12-month period beginning on , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 28, 2003section 20 of Pub. L. 108–100section 5001 of this title
